title: pedicularis oederi
intro: Pedicularis oederi, also known as Lousewort or Oeder's Lousewort, is a flowering plant belonging to the genus Pedicularis in the family Orobanchaceae. Traditionally, it has been used to treat various ailments, particularly those related to the respiratory and digestive systems, due to its medicinal properties. The plant's health benefits include its ability to alleviate symptoms of coughs, colds, and bronchitis, as well as its potential to aid in digestion and reduce inflammation. Pedicularis oederi can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infusement, making it a versatile herbal remedy for addressing a range of health issues.
